message.content:
(1) **Layout**: Projects are displayed as full-width cards (one per view, with a left-side visual panel + right-side text).  
(2) **Info per project**: Title (e.g., "Keythym"), description (bulleted features), and tech tags (e.g., Next.js, React, TypeScript).  
(3) **Tech tags**: Small, rounded rectangles with dark backgrounds and light text (e.g., "NEXT.JS" in a black box with white text).  
(4) **Hover/interaction**: A right-facing arrow on the project card suggests interactivity (likely links to project details).  
(5) **Section heading**: "Curated work" with "Curated" in white and "work" in purple, centered above the projects.
